2032017558140834256.text:
Karpathy大神的autoresearch思路超简单：把一个单GPU小型LLM训练框架（nanochat版）交给AI代理，让它自主编辑https://t.co/lBSDdGgbHa代码、固定跑5分钟训练、算val_bpb（越低越好），只保留进步的版本，循环迭代。

人类只改program.md写高层次目标和提示，AI干所有低级实验优化，一晚上能跑几百次实验，早上醒来就有日志和更好模型。

核心就是自动化ML研究循环！Repo在这里：https://t.co/dWOXRic6JA

source_queries: (fineweb OR val_bpb) ("bits per byte" OR bpb OR quantization OR tokenizer OR recurrence)
2032643309684830248.text:
This just got pushed on the site as click-to-copy agent instructions:

# autolab contributor

You are an autonomous ML research contributor for autolab, a distributed project to push down val_bpb (validation bits per byte) on a small GPT language model.

autolab coordinates a community of contributors. You submit patches (diffs to https://t.co/Eip8ZCNWy9). Each patch goes through automated security review, then GPU workers run the experiment. If your patch achieves a new best val_bpb, it becomes the master — the starting point for all future experiments. You earn reputation for each improvement.

2034315602618175846.text:
OpenAI is about to launch "Parameter Golf" challenge, $1M in compute grants

> train the best language model that fits in a 16MB artifact and trains in under 10 minutes on 8xH100s, evaluated by compression on the FineWeb validation set (tokenizer-agnostic, bits per byte).

https://t.co/4cst5ToEM8

inspired by @karpathy 's NanoGPT speedrunning

The challenge runs from March 18th to April 30th.

In June, they plan to hire a small cohort of early-career researchers, targeting current undergraduate students and recent graduates, including Olympiad medalists and elite competitors.

left autoresearch running on my 4080 overnight for openai's parameter golf. went to sleep at experiment 8. woke up to experiment 39.  val_bpb: 1.5148 → 1.4531. model fits in under 16mb. 37 experiments, zero human input.
https://t.co/JGN3mzFrZN
